headline: SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce on ETFs: 'We want to work with people on new products'
summary: SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce indicates an openness to work with Wall Street on fresh exchange-traded fund products tied to cryptocurrencies and tokenization.

raw.headline: SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce on ETFs: 'We want to work with people on new products'
raw.summary: SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce indicates an openness to work with Wall Street on fresh exchange-traded fund products tied to cryptocurrencies and tokenization.

headline: The difference between an IRA and a 401(k) — and how to take advantage of both
summary: IRAs and 401(k)s are both tax-advantaged retirement plans, but they have different benefits, requirements and drawbacks.

raw.headline: The difference between an IRA and a 401(k) — and how to take advantage of both
raw.summary: IRAs and 401(k)s are both tax-advantaged retirement plans, but they have different benefits, requirements and drawbacks.

headline: U.K. says Iran unsuccessfully targeted British-American Diego Garcia base
summary: The Wall Street Journal quoted U.S. officials as saying that one missile failed in flight, while the other was intercepted.

raw.headline: U.K. says Iran unsuccessfully targeted British-American Diego Garcia base
